title: Modelmeter Quality Snapshot
description: Per-model quality signals aggregated from public benchmarks (Layer 1) and, later, Modelmeter's own per-task evals (Layer 2). Keyed to Modelmeter model ids. Quality is a coarse, sourced signal — never presented as ground truth.

provisional.description: true means the data is hand-seeded or otherwise not yet from a real ingestion run. Consumers should surface this to callers.

id.description: Short source id, e.g. lmarena, swebench, gpqa, modelmeter-eval.

metric.description: Metric this source reports, e.g. elo, resolved_pct, accuracy, win_rate.

overall.description: Single headline quality score, typically LMArena Elo. Used by /swap's quality gate.

tasks.description: Per-task scores keyed by task id (coding, knowledge, writing, ...). Each value is a Score.

mapping_confidence.description: Confidence that the source leaderboard name was matched to the correct Modelmeter id. Ingestion auto-applies 'high'; 'medium'/'low' are surfaced in the PR for human confirmation.
